name: Chickpeas Italienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chickpeas and place them in fresh water. Cook for 50 minutes or until tender.
2. Heat oil in a large pot. Sauté onions and garlic for a few minutes.
3. Add tomatoes and tomato paste. Bring to a boil, then lower heat.
4. Add the remaining ingredients. Simmer for about 10 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
5. Serve with mashed potatoes and green vegetables, pasta, or rice.
Alternatively, use one large can of chickpeas, rinsed well before using.
Alternatively, use one pound of fresh tomatoes, diced.
